channel.title: Latest from Android Central
channel.description: All the latest content from the Android Central team

item.title: The Amazon Fire TV Stick 4K Plus is a whopping 40% off right now
item.description: The Fire TV Stick 4K Plus has all you need for plug-and-play streaming.
item.dc:creator: Zachary David

media:content.media:description: Amazon Fire TV stick
media:content.media:text: Amazon Fire TV stick
media:content.media:title: Amazon Fire TV stick

item.title: Give your Meta Quest a hand tracking upgrade with this hidden setting
item.description: Expanded Quick Actions adds several additional options to the hand tracking menu on Meta Quest headsets, and it's going to make your day.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:description: Using the Expanded Quick Actions menu with hand tracking on a Meta Quest 3
media:content.media:text: Using the Expanded Quick Actions menu with hand tracking on a Meta Quest 3
media:content.media:title: Using the Expanded Quick Actions menu with hand tracking on a Meta Quest 3

item.title: Best Buy launches huge sale on Bluetooth speakers — score Sony and JBL deals from $43!
item.description: Best Buy is running a sale that drops prices on a ton of party-ready Bluetooth speakers, with some particularly good deals on JBL and Sony models.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: The Bose SoundLink Micro 2 in black.
media:content.media:text: The Bose SoundLink Micro 2 in black.
media:content.media:title: The Bose SoundLink Micro 2 in black.

item.title: We finally got a Nothing Phone 4a Pro teaser, but that's not a Glyph Bar
item.description: Nothing finally teased its Phone 4a Pro on social media, and it seems to suggest a Dot Matrix is on the way.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: The Nothing Phone 4a on display at MWC 2026 in Black, White, Blue, and Pink colorways.
media:content.media:text: The Nothing Phone 4a on display at MWC 2026 in Black, White, Blue, and Pink colorways.
media:content.media:title: The Nothing Phone 4a on display at MWC 2026 in Black, White, Blue, and Pink colorways.

item.title: 'Canvas in AI Mode' makes drafts, interactive tools possible from right inside Search
item.description: Google unveiled "Canvas in AI Mode," which is rolling out to users in the U.S.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: AI Mode at I/O 2025
media:content.media:text: AI Mode at I/O 2025
media:content.media:title: AI Mode at I/O 2025

item.title: Android Central's MWC 2026 Best in Show
item.description: Android Central presents the MWC 2026 Best in Show awards, celebrating the products that stood out the most on the show floor.
item.author: derrek.lee@futurenet.com (Derrek Lee)
item.dc:creator: Derrek Lee

media:content.media:description: Devices from MWC 2026
media:content.media:text: Devices from MWC 2026
media:content.media:title: Devices from MWC 2026

item.title: Samsung’s MWC 2026 display demos feel like a glimpse into the future
item.description: Samsung Display creates the screens that power your favorite devices from all sorts of brands, and the company is working on new concepts worth your attention.
item.author: bradypsnyder@gmail.com (Brady Snyder)
item.dc:creator: Brady Snyder

media:content.media:description: The Samsung Display concepts shown off at MWC 2026.
media:content.media:text: The Samsung Display concepts shown off at MWC 2026.
media:content.media:title: The Samsung Display concepts shown off at MWC 2026.

item.title: OPPO, MediaTek let 'Omni' take the MWC 2026 stage, as the gateway to AI and the physical world
item.description: OPPO, MediaTek showcased several AI innovations through their partnership during MWC 2026.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: OPPO was present during MediaTek's MWC 2026 keynote to address the AI innovations the two have worked to produce.
media:content.media:text: OPPO was present during MediaTek's MWC 2026 keynote to address the AI innovations the two have worked to produce.
media:content.media:title: OPPO was present during MediaTek's MWC 2026 keynote to address the AI innovations the two have worked to produce.

item.title: Apple’s cheapest laptop in years is finally here to challenge Chromebooks
item.description: Apple’s $599 MacBook Neo runs on an iPhone chip, cuts some corners, and is finally giving Chromebooks a real fight for your cash.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: a woman typing on a yellow MacBook Neo
media:content.media:text: a woman typing on a yellow MacBook Neo
media:content.media:title: a woman typing on a yellow MacBook Neo

item.title: I used the Google Pixel 10a for two weeks, and it makes me question if price is a feature
item.description: The Google Pixel 10a has the same general design, processor, and display as its predecessor — should anyone buy it, or is the Pixel 9a a better deal?
item.author: bradypsnyder@gmail.com (Brady Snyder)
item.dc:creator: Brady Snyder

media:content.media:description: The Google Pixel 10a in the Lavender colorway.
media:content.media:text: The Google Pixel 10a in the Lavender colorway.
media:content.media:title: The Google Pixel 10a in the Lavender colorway.

item.title: The 'stylish' and 'compelling' Galaxy Watch 8 Classic just scored a huge 26% discount at Amazon
item.description: The Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 Classic—but for $130 less than usual.
item.dc:creator: Zachary David

media:content.media:description: The Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 Classic resting on a blanket showing a custom Facer watch face of Spongebob Squarepants.
media:content.media:text: The Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 Classic resting on a blanket showing a custom Facer watch face of Spongebob Squarepants.
media:content.media:title: The Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 Classic resting on a blanket showing a custom Facer watch face of Spongebob Squarepants.

item.title: YouTube’s latest bug leaves some viewers stuck with ads they can’t dismiss
item.description: YouTube's app is glitching hard, leaving ads stuck on your screen during videos with a "Dismiss" button that does absolutely nothing.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: YouTube on Pixel 7 Pro
media:content.media:text: YouTube on Pixel 7 Pro
media:content.media:title: YouTube on Pixel 7 Pro

item.title: I tested XGIMI's MemoMind One and they prove smart glasses don't need a camera to be good
item.description: The MemoMind One smart glasses focuses on heads-up information and voice interaction rather than camera features.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: Hands-on with the XGIMI MemoMind One smart glasses
media:content.media:text: Hands-on with the XGIMI MemoMind One smart glasses
media:content.media:title: Hands-on with the XGIMI MemoMind One smart glasses

item.title: March builds on Google Home automations, expands Nest's Yale Lock support
item.description: Google Home grabs a huge March update for automations, Nest's Yale Lock support, and its Gemini for Home test.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Creating automations in the Google Home app in 2024
media:content.media:text: Creating automations in the Google Home app in 2024
media:content.media:title: Creating automations in the Google Home app in 2024

item.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite is the fast help you need if you're a dev with complex data
item.description: Google announced Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite, a speedy, customizable AI model for developers with complex data.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Google Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite.
media:content.media:text: Google Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite.
media:content.media:title: Google Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite.

item.title: Android's March update is all about finding people, apps, and your missing bags
item.description: Google’s March Pixel Drop adds in-chat live location sharing, Play Store app previews, custom Calling Cards, kids’ games on Android Auto, and a smarter way to track lost luggage.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Android 16 review
media:content.media:text: Android 16 review
media:content.media:title: Android 16 review

item.title: Pixel Drop: March is off to the races with fresh Pixel updates for phones and watches
item.description: Google's March Pixel Drop added At a Glance updates, Circle to Search additions, Express Pay for the Pixel Watch, and more.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Google Pixel 10 Pro XL photos on Android Central
media:content.media:text: Google Pixel 10 Pro XL photos on Android Central
media:content.media:title: Google Pixel 10 Pro XL photos on Android Central

item.title: T-Mobile still wants to give you $300 to try its 5G Home Internet service
item.description: T-Mobile 5G Home Internet will give you $300 to try its All-In plan, plus a five-year price guarantee, streaming subscriptions, and more.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: Screenshot from T-Mobile 5G Home Internet instructional video
media:content.media:text: Screenshot from T-Mobile 5G Home Internet instructional video
media:content.media:title: Screenshot from T-Mobile 5G Home Internet instructional video

item.title: I went hands-on with the Vivo X300 Ultra — this is a camera phone like no other
item.description: Vivo just showcased the X300 Ultra at Mobile World Congress 2026, and I was able to use the device on the show floor. With even better cameras and a global release, the X300 Ultra may just be the camera phone of the year.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: Vivo X300 Ultra hands-on at MWC 2026
media:content.media:text: Vivo X300 Ultra hands-on at MWC 2026
media:content.media:title: Vivo X300 Ultra hands-on at MWC 2026

item.title: 4 ways Snapdragon Wear Elite will make your next wearable more useful
item.description: Your next smartwatch might use Snapdragon Wear Elite for on-device AI processing — here's how you'll actually benefit from the new features.
item.author: bradypsnyder@gmail.com (Brady Snyder)
item.dc:creator: Brady Snyder

media:content.media:description: The Qualcomm Snapdragon Wear Elite reference device.
media:content.media:text: The Qualcomm Snapdragon Wear Elite reference device.

item.title: Motorola unveils the Moto Buds 2, Buds 2 Plus with hi-res sound and long battery life
item.description: Motorola has two new earbuds at MWC 2026, including one with Bose audio. Here's everything you need to know about them.
item.author: bradypsnyder@gmail.com (Brady Snyder)
item.dc:creator: Brady Snyder

item.title: Tecno's Modular Phone concept actually looks really cool and takes me back to the fun Android days... While reminding me why modular phones never took off
item.description: Tecno showcased a modular phone concept at MWC 2026, with a bevy of accessories that attach magnetically to the back of the phone.
item.author: derrek.lee@futurenet.com (Derrek Lee)
item.dc:creator: Derrek Lee

media:content.media:text: Tecno Modular Phone accessories

item.title: Samsung seems very committed to putting Exynos in every future Galaxy
item.description: A Samsung exec reportedly discussed what the company's outlook will be for future Exynos chips and where they may be applied.

item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

item.title: Google turns Pixel’s Now Playing into a standalone app — and it’s a big deal
item.description: Google just moved Now Playing from the hidden corners of your settings to a shiny new Play Store app.

item.title: Heads up: Galaxy S26 Ultra test might've revealed its screen isn't as bright anymore
item.description: A report claimed that the Galaxy S26 Ultra's display is darker than the S25 Ultra, and its major new feature could be to blame.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

item.title: I turned my Pixel 10 Pro into the perfect bedside alarm clock
item.description: Turning your Google Pixel into an alarm clock is about more than just setting timers. Here's how I got the most out of these amazing hidden Pixel features.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:description: A Google Pixel 10 Pro XL on a Pixelsnap wireless charger with the screensaver function activated

item.title: 5 phones that are better than the Google Pixel 10a

item.title: Honor's Robot Phone is one of the strangest (and coolest) things I've seen at MWC 2026
item.description: Honor's Robot Phone at MWC 2026 features a motorized three-axis gimbal camera that tracks subjects and moves like a tiny robot.

item.title: TikTok's Meta Quest rival is finally coming to the US this year, alongside a new headset and redesigned OS

item.title: Google Photos for Android adds an overdue feature to cure your iPhone FOMO
item.description: Google Photos on Android now turns your photos into clean, AI-cut stickers in seconds, making everyday chats more personal without leaving the app.

item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

item.title: Qualcomm's Wi-Fi 8 chips are here, and they actually fix the stuff that annoys you
item.description: Qualcomm’s Wi-Fi 8 upgrade brings 11.6Gbps speeds, smarter AI-powered routers, and stronger multi-device connections, built to handle the growing strain of generative AI.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Qualcomm Logo

item.title: Qualcomm's new Snapdragon Wear Elite wants to make AI wearables actually smart
item.description: Qualcomm's Snapdragon Wear Elite brings powerful on-device AI, faster performance, and improved battery life to next-gen smartwatches and wearables.

item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

item.title: Qualcomm's X105 modem will keep you connected in elevators and parking garages
item.description: Qualcomm's latest cellular modem, the Qualcomm X105, is here with better satellite connectivity and improved coverage in parking garages and elevators.
item.author: bradypsnyder@gmail.com (Brady Snyder)
item.dc:creator: Brady Snyder

media:content.media:description: A press image of the Qualcomm X105 modem.
media:content.media:text: A press image of the Qualcomm X105 modem.

item.title: Motorola just shared Razr Fold specs, and it may just be the best camera and battery foldable of 2026
item.description: Motorola just showcased the Razr Fold in its entirety, and it demolishes the Galaxy Z Fold 7.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: Motorola Razr Fold hands-on testing
media:content.media:text: Motorola Razr Fold hands-on testing
media:content.media:title: Motorola Razr Fold hands-on testing

item.title: I went hands-on with the Razr Fold alongside the Galaxy Z Fold 7 — and I like Motorola's chances
item.description: The Motorola Razr Fold will have a bigger battery than any U.S. foldable and match Samsung's Galaxy Z Fold 7 with seven years of software support.
item.author: bradypsnyder@gmail.com (Brady Snyder)
item.dc:creator: Brady Snyder

media:content.media:description: Hands-on with the Motorola Razr Fold alongside the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 at MWC 2026.

item.title: The Bowers & Wilkins Px8 S2 are the best luxury ANC headphones that money can buy
item.description: If it's luxury you're after, the Bowers & Wilkins Px8 S2 has a beautifully refined look and weighty sound that is sure to delight your senses.
item.author: klpmediallc@gmail.com (Tshaka Armstrong)

item.title: Honor has the courage to do what Samsung won't, and that's convinced me of the Magic V6's greatness
item.description: The Honor Magic V6 is already official, and it's bringing the best screen ever, the largest battery, the best cameras, and tons of new features along with it.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

item.title: MWC 2026: Honor's Magic V6 is incredibly slim, and somehow packs a huge battery

item.title: I used the Xiaomi 17 Ultra for two weeks, and it makes the Galaxy S26 Ultra obsolete — this is the flagship camera upgrade you actually deserve
item.description: The Xiaomi 17 Ultra just made its global debut, and having used the phone for just over two weeks, I can say with some guarantee that it is a camera and battery powerhouse.

item.title: Four reasons why the Xiaomi Watch 5 is now my favorite Wear OS smartwatch

item.title: Samsung hits pause on next-gen Edge, Z TriFold phones, but is optimistic about the S Pen
